security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost http://127.0.0.1:*; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://github.com https://*.githubusercontent.com https://api.github.com

bundle.shortDescription: Workspace for running CLI coding agents.
bundle.longDescription: GLI is a confident dark instrument for spawning, organizing, and orchestrating CLI coding agents like Claude Code and Codex. macOS only.
